items.title: Heads up: Gemini is currently experiencing an outage.
items.title_zh: 注意：Gemini 目前正在经历停电。
items.description: Heads up: Gemini is currently experiencing an outage. We're on it and will get everything back up ASAP. Some of the fixes are in, the rest coming very soon. Stay tuned for updates, and thanks for bearing with us!
items.description_zh: 注意：Gemini 目前正在经历停电。我们正在处理并将尽快恢复一切。一些修复已经完成，其余的很快就会出现。请继续关注更新，感谢您对我们的支持！

items.title_zh: 可以确认的是，我们看到过去 48 小时内 Codex 的代币消耗量出现了强劲增长……

items.title: Welcome Clint and Michael!
items.description: Welcome Clint and Michael! Incredibly excited to see what we do together to contribute to the cybersecurity field and accelerate defenders across the globe. It's time to build. https://t.co/wu9CtJk38u
items.description_zh: 欢迎克林特和迈克尔！非常高兴看到我们共同努力为网络安全领域做出贡献并加速全球防御者的发展。是时候建造了。 https://t.co/wu9CtJk38u

items.title: Give yourself permission to build.
items.description: Give yourself permission to build. The traditional career ladder pushes everyone to become a leader, but I just want to be a builder. As you climb the ladder at most companies, you’re expected to step away from building and fill your time…
items.description_zh: 给自己建造的许可。传统的职业阶梯推动每个人都成为领导者，但我只想成为一名建设者。当你在大多数公司晋升时，你应该远离构建并打发时间……

items.title: Right from the early days of Gemini, enterprises would get the quality/cost tradeoff wron…
items.title_zh: 从 Gemini 成立之初起，企业就会在质量/成本权衡上犯错误……
items.description: Right from the early days of Gemini, enterprises would get the quality/cost tradeoff wrong. They’d often start with the smallest, cheapest model. The rule of thumb we gave customers: Replacing a traditional ML model with an LLM - start sma…
items.description_zh: 从 Gemini 成立之初起，企业就在质量/成本权衡上犯了错误。他们通常会从最小、最便宜的型号开始。我们为客户提供的经验法则：用 LLM 替换传统的 ML 模型 - start sma...
